publishedAbstract: One of the supported ODF Deployment scenarios includes ODF on master nodes excluding already present worker nodes. We would prefer to not have master nodes to be Schedulable always. What are the additional steps required to deploy ODF in this scenario?![alt text](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/images/odfonmasters.png)
publishedTitle: How to deploy ODF exclusively on the master nodes?
